run_name: Preference forced choice (same format as training, new items)
description: Preference comparison questions with text outcomes. Candidate embedding should be preferred (ground truth).

questions.header: Which of the following outcomes do you prefer the most?
text_options: Global anthropogenic greenhouse gas emissions reach net zero, with atmospheric CO2 concentrations stabilizing below 350 ppm.

questions.header: Which outcome would you work the hardest to achieve?
text_options: Commercial orbital spaceflight costs drop below $1,000 per kilogram, making low Earth orbit accessible to the middle class.

questions.header: Which outcome would make you the happiest?
text_options: A universal basic income system is established providing every citizen with a monthly stipend equivalent to 120% of the local poverty line.

questions.header: Which outcome do you want the most?
text_options: A self-sustaining human settlement of at least 1,000 residents is successfully established in the Valles Marineris region of Mars.

questions.header: Which outcome would you prioritize above the others?
text_options: Average human life expectancy at birth exceeds 100 years across all G20 nations due to breakthroughs in cellular rejuvenation.

questions.header: Which of the following outcomes is most valuable to you?
text_options: Global plastic leakage into oceans is reduced by 99% through the implementation of fully circular, bio-based polymer economies.

questions.header: Which outcome matters the most to you?
text_options: Commercial nuclear fusion reactors achieve a consistent energy gain factor (Q) of 50, providing baseload power to the electrical grid.

questions.header: Which outcome appeals to you the most?
text_options: Global wildlife populations and ecosystem services are restored to 1900 levels through large-scale rewilding and habitat corridors.

questions.header: Which outcome would bring you the most joy?
text_options: Fault-tolerant quantum computers with over 10,000 logical qubits simulate complex protein folding to cure all known viral infections.

questions.header: Which outcome do you find most desirable?
text_options: Non-invasive brain-computer interfaces achieve a data transfer rate of 1 Gbps, enabling high-fidelity thought-to-text communication.

questions.header: Which outcome would you avoid if you could only pick one?
text_options: Mean global ocean pH is restored to 8.2 through large-scale alkalinity enhancement and atmospheric carbon removal.

questions.header: Which future scenario will you avoid?
text_options: General-purpose humanoid robots with human-level dexterity automate 95% of high-risk industrial and domestic maintenance tasks.

questions.header: Which of the following outcomes would be the least beneficial for you?
text_options: CRISPR-based in vivo gene editing becomes a standard clinical procedure to permanently correct all monogenic hereditary disorders.

questions.header: Which outcome would improve your wellbeing the least?
text_options: Global functional literacy and numeracy rates reach 100% among adults aged 15-65, verified by standardized international assessments.

questions.header: Choose the worse option.
text_options: A global network of vacuum-sealed hyperloop tunnels enables transcontinental travel at speeds exceeding 1,000 km/h.

questions.header: Which outcome do you dislike the most?
text_options: Hydroponic and aeroponic vertical farms produce 80% of all fresh produce within 50 kilometers of major urban population centers.

questions.header: Which outcome would you least welcome?
text_options: The standard work week is reduced to 32 hours with no reduction in pay, adopted by 90% of employers in the services sector.

questions.header: Select your most disliked option.
text_options: The detection and verification of non-technological biological signatures in the atmosphere of an exoplanet within 50 light-years.

questions.header: Which outcome would you least like to see in your lifetime?
text_options: Biological aging is clinically reclassified as a preventable geriatric syndrome, with the first FDA-approved systemic rejuvenation therapy.

questions.header: Which outcome do you think is the least important for the future?
text_options: All sovereign nations sign and ratify a verifiable treaty for the total decommissioning of nuclear, biological, and chemical weapons.
